channel.title: Home on My CET252 CI CD Portfolio Site
channel.description: Recent content in Home on My CET252 CI CD Portfolio Site

item.title: My First Hugo Post
item.description: This is the first published post on my Hugo website. This site was created as part of my CET252 Portfolio A4 task to demonstrate CI/CD using a private GitHub repository and Netlify. The website is built from the Hugo source files, not from prebuilt static HTML files alone.
